structure._description: Référentiel de la nature physique ou structurelle d’un objet utilisé dans un thème astrologique.
structure.label: string

data.label: Celestial body
data.description: Physical astronomical body used in the chart, such as the Sun, Moon, planets, or Pluto.

data.label: Chart angle
data.description: Geometrical point of the chart derived from the local horizon and meridian, such as Ascendant, Descendant, Midheaven, or Imum Coeli.

data.label: Mathematical point
data.description: Non-physical point calculated from astronomical relationships, such as lunar nodes.
